untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of 'twin peaks' and 'confirmation line' which are visual/structural pattern elements not expressible with allowed indicators. Specifically: (1) Detection of two distinct peaks at similar price levels requires peak-finding logic unavailable in indicator set; (2) 'Confirmation line' is a custom support level derived from pattern geometry, not a standard indicator; (3) Volume pattern duration ('1 day' vs 'about a week') requires time-series pattern matching beyond single-bar indicator comparisons; (4) BEARISH is not in ALLOWED_REGIMES list (only TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, HIGH_VOL, ANY are allowed).
translation_notes: Mapped breakout condition (close below confirmation line) to close crossing below pivot as proxy. Mapped volume density requirement to hvol_20 comparison. Used 19% average decline as basis for stop_loss_pct estimate (2.5%). Maximum hold of 30 days based on 'within a month' pullback reference. Pattern detection itself requires pattern recognition capabilities beyond this structured rule format.
